Appearances:
Plaintiff Nay Patel dba Shahil Hotel is present.
Attorney Michael Heath appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dana Rae Capizano is present.
Attorney Peter Chess representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of OCT-22-2012 is vacated
